text: vayitechazeq shelomo ven-david 'al-malekhutov vayhva elohayv 'imov vayegadelehu lema'ela
vayomer shelomo lekhal-yiserael lesarey haalafim vehameovt velashofetim ulekhol nasi lekhal-yiserael rashey haavovt
vayelekhu shelomo vekhal-haqahal 'imov labama asher begive'ovn ki-sham haya ohel mov'ed haelohim asher 'asa moshe 'eved-yehva bamidebar
aval arovn haelohim he'ela david miqireyat ye'arim bahekhin lov david ki natah-lov ohel birushalaim
umizebach hanechoshet asher 'asa betsaleel ben-uri ven-chur sam lifeney mishekan yehva vayidereshehu shelomo vehaqahal
vaya'al shelomo sham 'al-mizebach hanechoshet lifeney yehva asher leohel mov'ed vaya'al 'alayv 'olovt alef
balayela hahu nirea elohim lishelomo vayomer lov sheal ma eten-lakh
vayomer shelomo lelohim ata 'asita 'im-david avi chesed gadovl vehimelakhetani tachetayv
'ata yehva elohim yeamen devarekha 'im david avi ki ata himelakhetani 'al-'am rav ka'afar haarets
'ata chakhema umada' ten-li veetsea lifeney ha'am-haze veavova ki-mi yishepot et-'amekha haze hagadovl s

vayomer-elohim ׀ lishelomo ya'an asher hayeta zot 'im-levavekha velosha-aleta 'osher nekhasim vekhavovd veet nefesh soneeykha vegam-yamim rabim lo shaaleta vatisheal-lekha chakhema umada' asher tishepovt et-'ami asher himelakhetikha 'alayv
hachakhema vehamada' natun lakh ve'osher unekhasim vekhavovd eten-lakh asher ׀ lo-haya khen lamelakhim asher lefaneykha veachareykha lo yiheyeh-ken
vayavo shelomo labama asher-begive'ovn yerushalaim milifeney ohel mov'ed vayimelokh 'al-yiserael f
vayeesof shelomo rekhev ufarashim vayehi-lov elef veareba'-meovt rekhev usheneym-'asar elef parashim vayanichem be'arey harekhev ve'im-hamelekh birushalaim
vayiten hamelekh et-hakesef veet-hazahav birushalaim kaavanim veet haarazim natan kashiqemim asher-bashefela larov
umovtsa hasusim asher lishelomo mimitserayim umiqeve socharey hamelekh miqeve yiqechu bimechir
vaya'alu vayovtsiu mimitserayim merekava beshesh meovt kesef vesus bachamishim umea vekhen lekhal-malekhey hachitim umalekhey aram beyadam yovtsiu
vayomer shelomo livenovt bayit leshem yehva uvayit lemalekhutov
vayisepor shelomo shive'im elef ish sabal ushemovnim elef ish chotsev bahar umenatsechim 'aleyhem sheloshet alafim veshesh meovt f
vayishelach shelomo el-churam melekhe-tsor lemor kaasher 'asita 'im-david avi vatishelach-lov arazim livenovt-lov vayit lashevet bov

hine ani vovneh-bayit leshem ׀ yehva elohay lehaqedish lov lehaqetir lefanayv qetoret-samim uma'arekhet tamid ve'olovt laboqer vela'erev lashabatovt velechodashim ulemov'adey yehva eloheynu le'ovlam zot 'al-yiserael
vehabayit asher-ani vovne gadovl ki-gadovl eloheynu mikal-haelohim
umi ya'atsar-kocha livenovt-lov vayit ki hashamayim ushemey hashamayim lo yekhalekeluhu umi ani asher eveneh-lov vayit ki im-lehaqetir lefanayv

ve'ata shelach-li ish-chakham la'asovt bazahav uvakesef uvanechoshet uvabarezel uvaaregevan vekharemil utekhelet veyode'a lefatecha pituchim 'im-hachakhamim asher 'imi bihuda uvirushalaim asher hekhin david avi
ushelach-li 'atsey arazim berovshim vealegumim mehalevanovn ki ani yada'eti asher 'avadeykha yovde'im likherovt 'atsey levanovn vehine 'avaday 'im-'avadeykha
ulehakhin li 'etsim larov ki habayit asher-ani vovne gadovl vehafele
vehine lachotevim ׀ lekhoretey ׀ ha'etsim natati chitim ׀ makovt la'avadeykha korim 'eserim elef use'orim korim 'eserim alef veyayin batim 'eserim elef veshemen batim 'eserim alef f
vayomer churam melekhe-tsor bikhetav vayishelach el-shelomo beahavat yehva et-'amov netanekha 'aleyhem melekh
vayomer churam barukh yehva elohey yiserael asher 'asa et-hashamayim veet-haarets asher natan ledavid hamelekh ben chakham yovde'a sekhel uvina asher yiveneh-bayit layhva uvayit lemalekhutov
ve'ata shalacheti ish-chakham yovde'a bina lechuram avi

ben-isha min-benovt dan veaviv ish-tsori yovde'a la'asovt bazahav-uvakesef banechoshet babarezel baavanim uva'etsim baaregaman batekhelet uvabuts uvakaremil ulefatecha kal-pitucha velacheshov kal-machashavet asher yinaten-lov 'im-chakhameykha vechakhemey adoni david avikha
ve'ata hachitim vehase'orim hashemen vehayayin asher amar adoni yishelach la'avadayv
vaanachenu nikherot 'etsim min-halevanovn kekhal-tsarekekha uneviem lekha rafesodovt 'al-yam yafov veata ta'ale otam yerushalaim f
vayisepor shelomo kal-haanashim hageyrim asher beerets yiserael acharey hasefar asher sefaram david aviv vayimatseu mea vachamishim elef usheloshet alafim veshesh meovt
vaya'as mehem shive'im elef sabal ushemonim elef chotsev bahar usheloshet alafim veshesh meovt menatsechim leha'avid et-ha'am
vayachel shelomo livenovt et-beyt-yehva birushalaim behar hamovriya asher nirea ledavid avihu asher hekhin bimeqovm david begoren arenan hayevusi
vayachel livenovt bachodesh hasheni basheni bishenat areba' lemalekhutov
veele husad shelomo livenovt et-beyt haelohim haorekh amovt bamida harishovna amovt shishim verochav amovt 'eserim
vehaulam asher 'al-peney haorekh 'al-peney rochav-habayit amovt 'eserim vehagovah mea ve'eserim vayetsapehu mipenima zahav tahovr
veet ׀ habayit hagadovl chipa 'ets berovshim vayechapehu zahav tovv vaya'al 'alayv timorim vesharesherovt
vayetsaf et-habayit even yeqara letifearet vehazahav zehav parevayim
vayechaf et-habayit haqorovt hasipim veqirovtayv vedaletovtayv zahav ufitach keruvim 'al-haqirovt s
vaya'as et-beyt-qodesh haqodashim arekov 'al-peney rochav-habayit amovt 'eserim verachebov amovt 'eserim vayechapehu zahav tovv lekhikarim shesh meovt
umisheqal lemisemerovt lisheqalim chamishim zahav veha'aliyovt chipa zahav
vaya'as beveyt-qodesh haqodashim keruvim shenayim ma'ase tsa'atsu'im vayetsapu otam zahav
vekhanefey hakeruvim arekam amovt 'eserim kenaf haechad leamovt chamesh maga'at leqir habayit vehakanaf haacheret amovt chamesh magi'a likhenaf hakeruv haacher
ukhenaf hakeruv haechad amovt chamesh magi'a leqir habayit vehakanaf haacheret amovt chamesh deveqa likhenaf hakeruv haacher
kanefey hakeruvim haele poresim amovt 'eserim vehem 'omedim 'al-rageleyhem ufeneyhem labayit s
vaya'as et-haparokhet tekhelet vearegaman vekharemil uvuts vaya'al 'alayv keruvim s
vaya'as lifeney habayit 'amudim shenayim amovt sheloshim vechamesh orekh vehatsefet asher-'al-roshov amovt chamesh s
vaya'as sharesherovt badevir vayiten 'al-rosh ha'amudim vaya'as rimovnim mea vayiten basharesherovt
vayaqem et-ha'amudim 'al-peney haheykhal echad miyamin veechad mehasemovl vayiqera shem hayemini kh hayemani q yakhin veshem hasemali bo'az s
vaya'as mizebach nechoshet 'eserim ama arekov ve'eserim ama rachebov ve'eser amovt qovmatov s
vaya'as et-hayam mutsaq 'eser baama misefatov el-sefatov 'agovl ׀ saviv vechamesh baama qovmatov veqav sheloshim baama yasov otov saviv
udemut beqarim tachat lov saviv ׀ saviv sovvevim otov 'eser baama maqifim et-hayam saviv shenayim turim habaqar yetsuqim bemutsaqetov
'ovmed 'al-sheneym 'asar baqar shelosha fonim ׀ tsafovna ushelovsha fonim ׀ yama ushelosha ׀ ponim negeba ushelosha ponim mizeracha vehayam 'aleyhem milema'ela vekhal-achoreyhem bayeta
ve'aveyov tefach usefatov kema'ase sefat-kovs perach shovshana machaziq batim sheloshet alafim yakhil s
vaya'as kiyovrim 'asara vayiten chamisha miyamin vachamisha misemovl lerachetsa vahem et-ma'ase ha'ovla yadichu vam vehayam lerachetsa lakohanim bov s
vaya'as et-menorovt hazahav 'eser kemishepatam vayiten baheykhal chamesh miyamin vechamesh misemovl s
vaya'as shulechanovt 'asara vayanach baheykhal chamisha miyamin vachamisha misemovl vaya'as mizereqey zahav mea
vaya'as chatsar hakohanim veha'azara hagedovla udelatovt la'azara vedaletovteyhem tsipa nechoshet
veet-hayam natan miketef hayemanit qedema mimul negeba
vaya'as churam et-hasirovt veet-haya'im veet-hamizeraqovt s vayekhal chyram kh churam q la'asovt et-hamelakha asher 'asa lamelekh shelomo beveyt haelohim
'amudim shenayim vehagulovt vehakotarovt 'al-rosh ha'amudim shetayim vehasevakhovt shetayim lekhasovt et-shetey gulovt hakotarovt asher 'al-rosh ha'amudim
veet-harimovnim areba' meovt lishetey hasevakhovt shenayim turim rimovnim lasevakha haechat lekhasovt et-shetey gulovt hakotarovt asher 'al-peney ha'amudim
veet-hamekhonovt 'asa veet-hakiyorovt 'asa 'al-hamekhonovt
et-hayam echad veet-habaqar sheneym-'asar tachetayv
veet-hasirovt veet-haya'im veet-hamizelagovt veet-kal-keleyhem 'asa churam aviv lamelekh shelomo leveyt yehva nechoshet maruq
bekhikar hayareden yetsaqam hamelekh ba'avi haadama beyn sukovt uveyn tseredata
vaya'as shelomo kal-hakelim haele larov meod ki lo necheqar misheqal hanechoshet f
vaya'as shelomo et kal-hakelim asher beyt haelohim veet mizebach hazahav veet-hashulechanovt va'aleyhem lechem hapanim
veet-hamenorovt veneroteyhem leva'aram kamishepat lifeney hadevir zahav sagur
vehaperach vehanerovt vehameleqachayim zahav hu mikhelovt zahav
vehamezamerovt vehamizeraqovt vehakapovt vehamachetovt zahav sagur ufetach habayit daletovtayv hapenimiyovt leqodesh haqodashim vedaletey habayit laheykhal zahav
vatishelam kal-hamelakha asher-'asa shelomo leveyt yehva s vayave shelomo et-qadeshey ׀ david aviv veet-hakesef veet-hazahav veet-kal-hakelim natan beotserovt beyt haelohim f
az yaqeheyl shelomo et-ziqeney yiserael veet-kal-rashey hamatovt nesiey haavovt liveney yiserael el-yerushalaim leha'alovt et-arovn berit-yehva me'ir david hi tsiyovn
vayiqahalu el-hamelekh kal-ish yiserael bechag hu hachodesh hashevi'i
vayavou kol ziqeney yiserael vayiseu haleviyim et-haarovn
vaya'alu et-haarovn veet-ohel mov'ed veet-kal-keley haqodesh asher baohel he'elu otam hakohanim haleviyim
vehamelekh shelomo vekhal-'adat yiserael hanov'adim 'alayv lifeney haarovn mezabechim tson uvaqar asher lo-yisaferu velo yimanu merov
vayaviu hakohanim et-arovn berit-yehva el-meqovmov el-devir habayit el-qodesh haqedashim el-tachat kanefey hakeruvim
vayiheyu hakeruvim poresim kenafayim 'al-meqovm haarovn vayekhasu hakeruvim 'al-haarovn ve'al-badayv milema'ela
vayaarikhu habadim vayerau rashey habadim min-haarovn 'al-peney hadevir velo yerau hachutsa vayehi-sham 'ad hayovm haze
eyn baarovn raq sheney haluchovt asher-natan moshe bechorev asher karat yehva 'im-beney yiserael betsetam mimitserayim f
vayehi betset hakohanim min-haqodesh ki kal-hakohanim hanimetseim hiteqadashu eyn lishemovr lemacheleqovt

vehaleviyim hameshorarim lekhulam leasaf leheyman lidutun veliveneyhem velaacheyhem melubashim buts bimetsiletayim uvinevalim vekhinorovt 'omedim mizerach lamizebecha ve'imahem kohanim lemea ve'eserim machetseririm kh machetserim q bachatsotserovt

vayehi kheechad lamachatsotserim kh lamechatserim q velameshorarim lehashemi'a qovl-echad lehalel ulehodovt layhva ukheharim qovl bachatsotserovt uvimetsiletayim uvikheley hashir uvehalel layhva ki tovv ki le'ovlam chasedov vehabayit male 'anan beyt yehva
velo-yakhelu hakohanim la'amovd lesharet mipeney he'anan ki-male khevovd-yehva et-beyt haelohim f
az amar shelomo yehva amar lishekovn ba'arafel
vaani baniti veyt-zevul lakh umakhovn leshivetekha 'ovlamim
vayasev hamelekh et-panayv vayevarekh et kal-qehal yiserael vekhal-qehal yiserael 'ovmed
vayomer barukh yehva elohey yiserael asher diber befiv et david avi uveyadayv mile lemor
min-hayovm asher hovtseti et-'ami meerets mitserayim lo-vachareti ve'ir mikol shivetey yiserael livenovt bayit liheyovt shemi sham velo-vachareti veish liheyovt nagid 'al-'ami yiserael
vaevechar birushalaim liheyovt shemi sham vaevechar bedavid liheyovt 'al-'ami yiserael
vayehi 'im-levav david avi livenovt bayit leshem yehva elohey yiserael
vayomer yehva el-david avi ya'an asher haya 'im-levavekha livenovt bayit lishemi hetivovta ki haya 'im-levavekha
raq ata lo tivene habayit ki vinekha hayovtse mechalatseykha hu-yivene habayit lishemi
vayaqem yehva et-devarov asher diber vaaqum tachat david avi vaeshev ׀ 'al-kise yiserael kaasher diber yehva vaevene habayit leshem yehva elohey yiserael
vaasim sham et-haarovn asher-sham berit yehva asher karat 'im-beney yiserael
vaya'amod lifeney mizebach yehva neged kal-qehal yiserael vayiferos kapayv

ki-'asa shelomo kiyovr nechoshet vayitenehu betovkh ha'azara chamesh amovt arekov vechamesh amovt rachebov veamovt shalovsh qovmatov vaya'amod 'alayv vayiverakh 'al-birekayv neged kal-qehal yiserael vayiferos kapayv hashamayema
vayomar yehva elohey yiserael eyn-kamovkha elohim bashamayim uvaarets shomer haberit vehachesed la'avadeykha haholekhim lefaneykha bekhal-libam
asher shamareta le'avedekha david avi et asher-dibareta lov vatedaber befikha uveyadekha mileta kayovm haze

ve'ata yehva ׀ elohey yiserael mor le'avedekha david avi et asher dibareta lov lemor lo-yikaret lekha ish milefanay yovshev 'al-kise yiserael raq im-yishemeru vaneykha et-darekam lalekhet betovrati kaasher halakheta lefanay
ve'ata yehva elohey yiserael yeamen devarekha asher dibareta le'avedekha ledavid
ki haumenam yeshev elohim et-haadam 'al-haarets hine shamayim ushemey hashamayim lo yekhalekelukha af ki-habayit haze asher baniti
ufanita el-tefilat 'avedekha veel-techinatov yehva elohay lishemo'a el-harina veel-hatefila asher 'avedekha mitepalel lefaneykha
liheyovt 'eyneykha fetuchovt el-habayit haze yovmam valayela el-hamaqovm asher amareta lasum shimekha sham lishemov'a el-hatefila asher yitepalel 'avedekha el-hamaqovm haze
veshama'eta el-tachanuney 'avedekha ve'amekha yiserael asher yitepalelu el-hamaqovm haze veata tishema' mimeqovm shivetekha min-hashamayim veshama'eta vesalacheta
im-yecheta ish lere'ehu venasha-vov ala lehaalotov uva ala lifeney mizebachakha babayit haze
veata ׀ tishema' min-hashamayim ve'asita veshafateta et-'avadeykha lehashiv lerasha' latet darekov beroshov ulehatsediq tsadiq latet lov ketsideqatov s
veim-yinagef 'amekha yiserael lifeney ovyev ki yecheteu-lakh veshavu vehovdu et-shemekha vehitepalelu vehitechanenu lefaneykha babayit haze
veata tishema' min-hashamayim vesalacheta lechatat 'amekha yiserael vahasheyvovtam el-haadama asher-natata lahem velaavoteyhem f
behe'atser hashamayim velo-yiheye matar ki yecheteu-lakh vehitepalelu el-hamaqovm haze vehovdu et-shemekha mechatatam yeshuvun ki ta'anem
veata ׀ tishema' hashamayim vesalacheta lechatat 'avadeykha ve'amekha yiserael ki tovrem el-haderekh hatovva asher yelekhu-vah venatata matar 'al-aretsekha asher-natata le'amekha lenachala s
ra'av ki-yiheye vaarets dever ki-yiheye shidafovn veyeraqovn arebe vechasil ki yiheye ki yatsar-lov ovyevayv beerets she'arayv kal-nega' vekhal-machala
kal-tefila khal-techina asher yiheye lekhal-haadam ulekhol 'amekha yiserael asher yede'u ish nige'ov umakheovov ufaras kapayv el-habayit haze
veata tishema' min-hashamayim mekhovn shivetekha vesalacheta venatata laish kekhal-derakhayv asher teda' et-levavov ki ata levadekha yada'eta et-levav beney haadam
lema'an yiraukha lalekhet biderakheykha kal-hayamim asher-hem chayim 'al-peney haadama asher natata laavoteynu s
vegam el-hanakheri asher lo me'amekha yiserael hu uva ׀ meerets rechovqa lema'an shimekha hagadovl veyadekha hachazaqa uzerov'akha hanetuya uvau vehitepalelu el-habayit haze

veata tishema' min-hashamayim mimekhovn shivetekha ve'asita kekhol asher-yiqera eleykha hanakheri lema'an yede'u khal-'amey haarets et-shemekha uleyirea otekha ke'amekha yiserael velada'at ki-shimekha niqera 'al-habayit haze asher baniti
ki-yetse 'amekha lamilechama 'al-ovyevayv baderekh asher tishelachem vehitepalelu eleykha derekh ha'ir hazot asher bachareta bah vehabayit asher-baniti lishemekha
veshama'eta min-hashamayim et-tefilatam veet-techinatam ve'asita mishepatam
ki yecheteu-lakh ki eyn adam asher lo-yecheta veanafeta vam unetatam lifeney ovyev veshavum shovveyhem el-erets rechovqa ov qerovva
veheshivu el-levavam baarets asher nishebu-sham veshavu ׀ vehitechanenu eleykha beerets shiveyam lemor chatanu he'evinu verasha'enu
veshavu eleykha bekhal-libam uvekhal-nafesham beerets shiveyam asher-shavu otam vehitepalelu derekh aretsam asher natata laavovtam veha'ir asher bachareta velabayit asher-baniti lishemekha
veshama'eta min-hashamayim mimekhovn shivetekha et-tefilatam veet-techinoteyhem ve'asita mishepatam vesalacheta le'amekha asher chateu-lakh
'ata elohay yiheyu-na 'eyneykha petuchovt veazeneykha qashuvovt litefilat hamaqovm haze s
ve'ata quma yehva elohim lenuchekha ata vaarovn 'uzekha kohaneykha yehva elohim yilebeshu teshu'a vachasideykha yisemechu vatovv
yehva elohim al-tashev peney meshicheykha zakhera lechasedey david 'avedekha f
ukhekhalovt shelomo lehitepalel vehaesh yareda mehashamayim vatokhal ha'ola vehazevachim ukhevovd yehva male et-habayit
velo yakhelu hakohanim lavov el-beyt yehva ki-male khevovd-yehva et-beyt yehva
vekhol ׀ beney yiserael roim beredet haesh ukhevovd yehva 'al-habayit vayikhere'u apayim aretsa 'al-haritsefa vayishetachavu vehovdovt layhva ki tovv ki le'ovlam chasedov
vehamelekh vekhal-ha'am zovechim zevach lifeney yehva s
vayizebach hamelekh shelomo et-zevach habaqar 'eserim ushenayim elef vetson mea ve'eserim alef vayachenekhu et-beyt haelohim hamelekh vekhal-ha'am

vehakohanim 'al-mishemerovtam 'omedim vehaleviyim bikheley-shir yehva asher 'asa david hamelekh lehodovt layhva ki-le'ovlam chasedov behalel david beyadam vehakohanim machatsotserim kh machetserim q negedam vekhal-yiserael 'omedim s

vayeqadesh shelomo et-tovkh hechatser asher lifeney veyt-yehva ki-'asa sham ha'olovt veet chelevey hashelamim ki-mizebach hanechoshet asher 'asa shelomo lo yakhovl lehakhil et-ha'ola veet-haminecha veet-hachalavim
vaya'as shelomo et-hechag ba'et hahi shive'at yamim vekhal-yiserael 'imov qahal gadovl meod milevov chamat 'ad-nachal mitserayim
vaya'asu bayovm hashemini 'atsaret ki ׀ chanukat hamizebecha 'asu shive'at yamim vehechag shive'at yamim
uveyovm 'eserim ushelosha lachodesh hashevi'i shilach et-ha'am leaholeyhem semechim vetovvey lev 'al-hatovva asher 'asa yehva ledavid velishelomo uleyiserael 'amov
vayekhal shelomo et-beyt yehva veet-beyt hamelekh veet kal-haba 'al-lev shelomo la'asovt beveyt-yehva uveveytov hitselicha f
vayera yehva el-shelomo balayela vayomer lov shama'eti et-tefilatekha uvachareti bamaqovm haze li leveyt zavach
hen e'etsor hashamayim velo-yiheye matar vehen-atsave 'al-chagav leekhovl haarets veim-ashalach dever be'ami
veyikane'u 'ami asher niqera-shemi 'aleyhem veyitepalelu vivaqeshu fanay veyashuvu midarekheyhem hara'im vaani eshema' min-hashamayim veeselach lechatatam veerepa et-aretsam
'ata 'eynay yiheyu fetuchovt veazenay qashuvovt litefilat hamaqovm haze
ve'ata bachareti vehiqedasheti et-habayit haze liheyovt-shemi sham 'ad-'ovlam vehayu 'eynay velibi sham kal-hayamim
veata im-telekh lefanay kaasher halakh david avikha vela'asovt kekhol asher tsivitikha vechuqay umishepatay tishemovr
vahaqimovti et kise malekhutekha kaasher karati ledavid avikha lemor lo-yikaret lekha ish movshel beyiserael
veim-teshuvun atem va'azavetem chuqovtay umitseotay asher natati lifeneykhem vahalakhetem va'avadetem elohim acherim vehishetachavitem lahem
unetashetim me'al ademati asher natati lahem veet-habayit haze asher hiqedasheti lishemi ashelikh me'al panay veetenenu lemashal velishenina bekhal-ha'amim
vehabayit haze asher haya 'eleyovn lekhal-'over 'alayv yishom veamar bame 'asa yehva kakha laarets hazot velabayit haze
veameru 'al asher 'azevu et-yehva ׀ elohey avoteyhem asher hovtsiam meerets mitserayim vayachaziqu belohim acherim vayishetachavu lahem vaya'avedum 'al-ken hevi 'aleyhem et kal-hara'a hazot f
vayehi miqets ׀ 'eserim shana asher bana shelomo et-beyt yehva veet-beytov
vehe'arim asher natan churam lishelomo bana shelomo otam vayovshev sham et-beney yiserael
vayelekh shelomo chamat tsovva vayechezaq 'aleyha
vayiven et-tademor bamidebar veet kal-'arey hamisekenovt asher bana bachamat
vayiven et-beyt chovrovn ha'eleyovn veet-beyt chovrovn hatachetovn 'arey matsovr chovmovt delatayim uvericha

veet-ba'alat veet kal-'arey hamisekenovt asher hayu lishelomo veet kal-'arey harekhev veet 'arey haparashim veet ׀ kal-chesheq shelomo asher chashaq livenovt birushalaim uvalevanovn uvekhol erets memeshaletov
kal-ha'am hanovtar min-hachiti vehaemori vehaperizi vehachivi vehayevusi asher lo miyiserael hema
min-beneyhem asher novteru achareyhem baarets asher lo-khilum beney yiserael vaya'alem shelomo lemas 'ad hayovm haze
umin-beney yiserael asher lo-natan shelomo la'avadim limelakhetov ki-hema aneshey milechama vesarey shalishayv vesarey rikhebov ufarashayv f
veele sarey hanetsivim kh hanitsavim q asher-lamelekh shelomo chamishim umatayim harodim ba'am
veet-bat-pare'o he'ela shelomo me'ir david labayit asher banah-lah ki amar lo-teshev isha li beveyt david melekhe-yiserael ki-qodesh hema asher-baa aleyhem arovn yehva f
az he'ela shelomo 'olovt layhva 'al mizebach yehva asher bana lifeney haulam
uvidevar-yovm beyovm leha'alovt kemitsevat moshe lashabatovt velechodashim velamov'adovt shalovsh pe'amim bashana bechag hamatsovt uvechag hashavu'ovt uvechag hasukovt

vaya'amed kemishepat david-aviv et-macheleqovt hakohanim 'al-'avodatam vehaleviyim 'al-mishemerovtam lehalel ulesharet neged hakohanim lidevar-yovm beyovmov vehashov'arim bemacheleqovtam lesha'ar vasha'ar ki khen mitsevat david ish-haelohim
velo saru mitsevat hamelekh 'al-hakohanim vehaleviyim lekhal-davar velaotsarovt
vatikon kal-melekhet shelomo 'ad-hayovm musad beyt-yehva ve'ad-kelotov shalem beyt yehva s
az halakh shelomo le'etseyovn-gever veel-eylovt 'al-sefat hayam beerets edovm

vayishelach-lov churam beyad-'avadayv ovniyovt kh oniyovt q va'avadim yovde'ey yam vayavou 'im-'avedey shelomo ovfira vayiqechu misham areba'-meovt vachamishim kikar zahav vayaviu el-hamelekh shelomo f

umalekat-sheva shame'a et-shema' shelomo vatavov lenasovt et-shelomo vechidovt birushalaim bechayil kaved meod ugemalim noseim besamim vezahav larov veeven yeqara vatavov el-shelomo vatedaber 'imov et kal-asher haya 'im-levavah
vayaged-lah shelomo et-kal-devareyha velo-ne'elam davar mishelomo asher lo higid lah
vatere malekat-sheva et chakhemat shelomo vehabayit asher bana
umaakhal shulechanov umovshav 'avadayv uma'amad mesharetayv umalebusheyhem umasheqayv umalebusheyhem va'aliyatov asher ya'ale beyt yehva velo-haya 'ovd bah rucha
vatomer el-hamelekh emet hadavar asher shama'eti bearetsi 'al-devareykha ve'al-chakhematekha
velo-heemaneti ledivereyhem 'ad asher-bati vatireeyna 'eynay vehine lo hugad-li chatsi marebit chakhematekha yasafeta 'al-hashemu'a asher shama'eti
asherey anasheykha veasherey 'avadeykha ele ha'omedim lefaneykha tamid veshome'im et-chakhematekha

yehi yehva eloheykha barukh asher ׀ chafets bekha letitekha 'al-kiseov lemelekh layhva eloheykha beahavat eloheykha et-yiserael leha'amidov le'ovlam vayitenekha 'aleyhem lemelekh la'asovt mishepat utsedaqa
vatiten lamelekh mea ve'eserim ׀ kikar zahav uvesamim larov meod veeven yeqara velo haya kabosem hahu asher-natena malekat-sheva lamelekh shelomo
vegam-'avedey chiram kh churam q ve'avedey shelomo asher-heviu zahav meovfir heviu 'atsey alegumim veeven yeqara
vaya'as hamelekh et-'atsey haalegumim mesilovt leveyt-yehva uleveyt hamelekh vekhinorovt unevalim lasharim velo-nireu khahem lefanim beerets yehuda
vehamelekh shelomo natan lemalekat-sheva et-kal-chefetsah asher shaala milevad asher-hevia el-hamelekh vatahafokh vatelekh learetsah hi va'avadeyha f
vayehi misheqal hazahav asher-ba lishelomo beshana echat shesh meovt veshishim vashesh kikerey zahav
levad meaneshey hatarim vehasocharim meviim vekhal-malekhey 'arav ufachovt haarets meviim zahav vakhesef lishelomo
vaya'as hamelekh shelomo matayim tsina zahav shachut shesh meovt zahav shachut ya'ale 'al-hatsina haechat
ushelosh-meovt maginim zahav shachut shelosh meovt zahav ya'ale 'al-hamagen haechat vayitenem hamelekh beveyt ya'ar halevanovn f
vaya'as hamelekh kise-shen gadovl vayetsapehu zahav tahovr
veshesh ma'alovt lakise vekhevesh bazahav lakise maochazim veyadovt mize umize 'al-meqovm hashavet ushenayim arayovt 'omedim etsel hayadovt
usheneym 'asar arayovt 'omedim sham 'al-shesh hama'alovt mize umize lo-na'asa khen lekhal-mamelakha
vekhol keley masheqe hamelekh shelomo zahav vekhol keley beyt-ya'ar halevanovn zahav sagur eyn kesef necheshav bimey shelomo limeuma
ki-oniyovt lamelekh holekhovt tareshish 'im 'avedey churam achat leshalovsh shanim tavovna ׀ oniyovt tareshish noseovt zahav vakhesef shenehabim veqovfim vetukiyim f
vayigedal hamelekh shelomo mikol malekhey haarets le'osher vechakhema
vekhol malekhey haarets mevaqeshim et-peney shelomo lishemo'a et-chakhematov asher-natan haelohim belibov
vehem meviim ish minechatov keley khesef ukheley zahav uselamovt nesheq uvesamim susim uferadim devar-shana beshana f
vayehi lishelomo areba'at alafim ureyovt susim umarekavovt usheneym-'asar elef parashim vayanichem be'arey harekhev ve'im-hamelekh birushalaim
vayehi movshel bekhal-hamelakhim min-hanahar ve'ad-erets pelishetim ve'ad gevul mitserayim
vayiten hamelekh et-hakesef birushalaim kaavanim veet haarazim natan kashiqemim asher-bashefela larov
umovtsiim susim mimitserayim lishelomo umikal-haaratsovt
ushear diverey shelomo harishonim vehaacharovnim halo-hem ketuvim 'al-diverey natan hanavi ve'al-nevuat achiya hashilovni uvachazovt ye'edi kh ye'edov q hachoze 'al-yarave'am ben-nevat
vayimelokh shelomo virushalaim 'al-kal-yiserael areba'im shana
vayishekav shelomo 'im-avotayv vayiqeberuhu be'ir david aviv vayimelokh rechave'am benov tachetayv f
vayelekh rechave'am shekhema ki shekhem bau khal-yiserael lehamelikh otov
vayehi kishemo'a yarave'am ben-nevat vehu vemitserayim asher barach mipeney shelomo hamelekh vayashav yarave'am mimitserayim
vayishelechu vayiqereu-lov vayavo yarave'am vekhal-yiserael vayedaberu el-rechave'am lemor
avikha hiqesha et-'ulenu ve'ata haqel me'avodat avikha haqasha ume'ulov hakaved asher-natan 'aleynu vena'avedeka
vayomer alehem 'ovd sheloshet yamim veshuvu elay vayelekh ha'am s
vayiva'ats hamelekh rechave'am et-hazeqenim asher-hayu 'omedim lifeney shelomo aviv biheyotov chay lemor eykh atem nov'atsim lehashiv la'am-haze davar
vayedaberu elayv lemor im-tiheye letovv leha'am haze uretsitam vedibareta alehem devarim tovvim vehayu lekha 'avadim kal-hayamim
vaya'azov et-'atsat hazeqenim asher ye'atsuhu vayiva'ats et-hayeladim asher gadelu itov ha'omedim lefanayv
vayomer alehem ma atem nov'atsim venashiv davar et-ha'am haze asher diberu elay lemor haqel min-ha'ol asher-natan avikha 'aleynu
vayedaberu itov hayeladim asher gadelu itov lemor koh-tomar la'am asher-diberu eleykha lemor avikha hikhebid et-'ulenu veata haqel me'aleynu ko tomar alehem qatani 'ava mimateney avi
ve'ata avi he'emis 'aleykhem 'ol kaved vaani osif 'al-'ulekhem avi yisar etekhem bashovtim vaani ba'aqerabim s
vayavo yarave'am vekhal-ha'am el-rechave'am bayovm hashelishi kaasher diber hamelekh lemor shuvu elay bayovm hashelishi
vaya'anem hamelekh qasha vaya'azov hamelekh rechave'am et 'atsat hazeqenim
vayedaber alehem ka'atsat hayeladim lemor akhebid et-'ulekhem vaani osif 'alayv avi yisar etekhem bashovtim vaani ba'aqerabim
velo-shama' hamelekh el-ha'am ki-hayeta nesiba me'im haelohim lema'an haqim yehva et-devarov asher diber beyad achiyahu hashilovni el-yarave'am ben-nevat

vekhal-yiserael ki lo-shama' hamelekh lahem vayashivu ha'am et-hamelekh ׀ lemor mah-lanu cheleq bedavid velo-nachala beven-yishay ish leohaleykha yiserael 'ata ree veytekha david vayelekh kal-yiserael leohalayv s
uveney yiserael hayoshevim be'arey yehuda vayimelokh 'aleyhem rechave'am
vayishelach hamelekh rechave'am et-hadoram asher 'al-hamas vayiregemu-vov veney-yiserael even vayamot vehamelekh rechave'am hiteamets la'alovt bamerekava lanus yerushalaim s
vayifeshe'u yiserael beveyt david 'ad hayovm haze s
vayavo rechave'am yerushalaim vayaqehel et-beyt yehuda uvineyamin mea ushemovnim elef bachur 'ose milechama lehilachem 'im-yiserael lehashiv et-hamamelakha lirechave'am f
vayehi devar-yehva el-shema'eyahu ish-haelohim lemor
emor el-rechave'am ben-shelomo melekh yehuda veel kal-yiserael bihuda uvineyamin lemor
ko amar yehva lo-ta'alu velo-tilachamu 'im-acheykhem uvu ish leveytov ki meiti niheya hadavar haze vayisheme'u et-diverey yehva vayashuvu milekhet el-yarave'am f
vayeshev rechave'am birushalaim vayiven 'arim lematsovr bihuda
vayiven et-beyt-lechem veet-'eytam veet-teqov'a
veet-beyt-tsur veet-sovkhov veet-'adulam
veet-gat veet-maresha veet-zif
veet-adovrayim veet-lakhish veet-'azeqa
veet-tsare'a veet-ayalovn veet-cheverovn asher bihuda uvevineyamin 'arey metsurovt
vayechazeq et-hametsurovt vayiten bahem negidim veotserovt maakhal veshemen vayayin
uvekhal-'ir va'ir tsinovt uremachim vayechazeqem leharebe meod vayehi-lov yehuda uvineyamin s
vehakohanim vehaleviyim asher bekhal-yiserael hiteyatsevu 'alayv mikal-gevulam
ki-'azevu haleviyim et-migeresheyhem vaachuzatam vayelekhu lihuda velirushalaim ki-hizenicham yarave'am uvanayv mikahen layhva
vaya'amed-lov kohanim labamovt velase'irim vela'agalim asher 'asa
veachareyhem mikol shivetey yiserael hanotenim et-levavam levaqesh et-yehva elohey yiserael bau yerushalaim lizebovcha layhva elohey avovteyhem
vayechazequ et-malekhut yehuda vayeametsu et-rechave'am ben-shelomo leshanim shalovsh ki halekhu bederekh david ushelomo leshanim shalovsh
vayiqach-lov rechave'am isha et-machalat ben kh bat-yerimovt q ben-david avihayil bat-eliav ben-yishay
vateled lov banim et-ye'ush veet-shemareya veet-zaham
veachareyha laqach et-ma'akha bat-aveshalovm vateled lov et-aviya veet-'atay veet-ziza veet-shelomit
vayeehav rechave'am et-ma'akha vat-aveshalovm mikal-nashayv ufilageshayv ki nashim shemovneh-'esere nasa ufilageshim shishim vayovled 'eserim ushemovna banim veshishim banovt
vaya'amed larosh rechave'am et-aviya ven-ma'akha lenagid beechayv ki lehamelikhov
vayaven vayiferots mikal-banayv lekhal-aretsovt yehuda uvineyamin lekhol 'arey hametsurovt vayiten lahem hamazovn larov vayisheal hamovn nashim
vayehi kehakhin malekhut rechave'am ukhechezeqatov 'azav et-tovrat yehva vekhal-yiserael 'imov f
vayehi bashana hachamishit lamelekh rechave'am 'ala shishaq melekhe-mitserayim 'al-yerushalaim ki ma'alu bayhva
beelef umatayim rekhev uveshishim elef parashim veeyn misepar la'am asher-bau 'imov mimitserayim luvim sukiyim vekhushim
vayilekod et-'arey hametsurovt asher lihuda vayavo 'ad-yerushalaim s
ushema'eya hanavi ba el-rechave'am vesarey yehuda asher-neesefu el-yerushalaim mipeney shishaq vayomer lahem koh-amar yehva atem 'azavetem oti veaf-ani 'azaveti etekhem beyad-shishaq
vayikane'u sarey-yiserael vehamelekh vayomeru tsadiq ׀ yehva
uvireovt yehva ki nikhena'u haya devar-yehva el-shema'eya ׀ lemor nikhene'u lo ashechitem venatati lahem kime'at lifeleyta velo-titakh chamati birushalaim beyad-shishaq
ki yiheyu-lov la'avadim veyede'u 'avovdati va'avovdat mamelekhovt haaratsovt s
vaya'al shishaq melekhe-mitserayim 'al-yerushalaim vayiqach et-otserovt beyt-yehva veet-otserovt beyt hamelekh et-hakol laqach vayiqach et-maginey hazahav asher 'asa shelomo
vaya'as hamelekh rechave'am tacheteyhem maginey nechoshet vehifeqid 'al-yad sarey haratsim hashomerim petach beyt hamelekh
vayehi midey-vov hamelekh beyt yehva bau haratsim unesaum veheshivum el-ta haratsim
uvehikane'ov shav mimenu af-yehva velo lehashechit lekhala vegam bihuda haya devarim tovvim s

vayitechazeq hamelekh rechave'am birushalaim vayimelokh ki ven-areba'im veachat shana rechave'am bemalekhov ushava' 'esere shana ׀ malakh birushalaim ha'ir asher-bachar yehva lasum et-shemov sham mikol shivetey yiserael veshem imov na'ama ha'amonit
vaya'as hara' ki lo hekhin libov liderovsh et-yehva s
vediverey rechave'am harishonim vehaacharovnim halo-hem ketuvim bediverey shema'eya hanavi ve'idov hachoze lehiteyaches umilechamovt rechave'am veyarave'am kal-hayamim
vayishekav rechave'am 'im-avotayv vayiqaver be'ir david vayimelokh aviya venov tachetayv f
bishenat shemovne 'esere lamelekh yarave'am vayimelokh aviya 'al-yehuda
shalovsh shanim malakh birushalaim veshem imov mikhayahu vat-uriel min-give'a umilechama hayeta beyn aviya uveyn yarave'am
vayeesor aviya et-hamilechama bechayil gibovrey milechama areba'-meovt elef ish bachur s veyarave'am 'arakh 'imov milechama bishemovne meovt elef ish bachur gibovr chayil s
vayaqam aviya me'al lehar tsemarayim asher behar eferayim vayomer shema'uni yarave'am vekhal-yiserael
halo lakhem lada'at ki yehva ׀ elohey yiserael natan mamelakha ledavid 'al-yiserael le'ovlam lov ulevanayv berit melach s
vayaqam yarave'am ben-nevat 'eved shelomo ven-david vayimerod 'al-adonayv
vayiqavetsu 'alayv anashim reqim beney veliya'al vayiteametsu 'al-rechave'am ben-shelomo urechave'am haya na'ar verakhe-levav velo hitechazaq lifeneyhem
ve'ata ׀ atem omerim lehitechazeq lifeney mamelekhet yehva beyad beney david veatem hamovn rav ve'imakhem 'egeley zahav asher 'asa lakhem yarave'am lelohim
halo hidachetem et-kohaney yehva et-beney aharon vehaleviyim vata'asu lakhem kohanim ke'amey haaratsovt kal-haba lemale yadov befar ben-baqar veeylim shive'a vehaya khohen lelo elohim s
vaanachenu yehva eloheynu velo 'azavenuhu vekhohanim mesharetim layhva beney aharon vehaleviyim bamelakhet

umaqetirim layhva 'olovt baboqer-baboqer uva'erev-ba'erev uqetoret-samim uma'arekhet lechem 'al-hashulechan hatahovr umenovrat hazahav veneroteyha leva'er ba'erev ba'erev ki-shomerim anachenu et-mishemeret yehva eloheynu veatem 'azavetem otov
vehine 'imanu varosh haelohim ׀ vekhohanayv vachatsotserovt hateru'a lehari'a 'aleykhem beney yiserael al-tilachamu 'im-yehva elohey-avoteykhem ki-lo tatselichu
veyarave'am hesev et-hamaerav lavov meachareyhem vayiheyu lifeney yehuda vehamaerav meachareyhem
vayifenu yehuda vehine lahem hamilechama panim veachovr vayitse'aqu layhva vehakohanim machatsotserim kh machetserim q bachatsotserovt
vayari'u ish yehuda vayehi behari'a ish yehuda vehaelohim nagaf et-yarave'am vekhal-yiserael lifeney aviya vihuda
vayanusu veney-yiserael mipeney yehuda vayitenem elohim beyadam
vayaku vahem aviya ve'amov maka raba vayipelu chalalim miyiserael chamesh-meovt elef ish bachur
vayikane'u veney-yiserael ba'et hahi vayeemetsu beney yehuda ki nishe'anu 'al-yehva elohey avovteyhem
vayiredof aviya acharey yarave'am vayilekod mimenu 'arim et-beyt-el veet-benovteyha veet-yeshana veet-benovteyha veet 'eferovn kh 'eferayin q uvenoteyha
velo-'atsar kocha-yarave'am 'ovd bimey aviyahu vayigefehu yehva vayamot f
vayitechazeq aviyahu vayisa-lov nashim areba' 'esere vayovled 'eserim ushenayim banim veshesh 'esere banovt s
veyeter diverey aviya uderakhayv udevarayv ketuvim bemiderash hanavi 'idov
vayishekav aviya 'im-avotayv vayiqeberu otov be'ir david vayimelokh asa venov tachetayv beyamayv shaqeta haarets 'eser shanim f
vaya'as asa hatovv vehayashar be'eyney yehva elohayv
vayasar et-mizebechovt hanekhar vehabamovt vayeshaber et-hamatsevovt vayegada' et-haasherim
vayomer lihuda liderovsh et-yehva elohey avovteyhem vela'asovt hatovra vehamitseva
vayasar mikal-'arey yehuda et-habamovt veet-hachamanim vatisheqot hamamelakha lefanayv
vayiven 'arey metsura bihuda ki-shaqeta haarets veeyn-'imov milechama bashanim haele ki-henicha yehva lov
vayomer lihuda nivene ׀ et-he'arim haele venasev chovma umigedalim delatayim uverichim 'ovdenu haarets lefaneynu ki darashenu et-yehva eloheynu darashenu vayanach lanu misaviv vayivenu vayatselichu f
vayehi leasa chayil nose tsina varomach mihuda shelosh meovt elef s umibineyamin noseey magen vedorekhey qeshet matayim ushemovnim alef kal-ele gibovrey chayil
vayetse aleyhem zerach hakushi bechayil elef alafim umarekavovt shelosh meovt vayavo 'ad-maresha
vayetse asa lefanayv vaya'arekhu milechama begey tsefata lemaresha

vayiqera asa el-yehva elohayv vayomar yehva eyn-'imekha la'ezovr beyn rav leeyn kocha 'azerenu yehva eloheynu ki-'aleykha nishe'anu uveshimekha vanu 'al-hehamovn haze yehva eloheynu ata al-ya'etsor 'imekha enovsh s
vayigof yehva et-hakushim lifeney asa velifeney yehuda vayanusu hakushim
vayiredefem asa veha'am asher-'imov 'ad-ligerar vayipol mikushim leeyn lahem micheya ki-nisheberu lifeney-yehva velifeney machanehu vayiseu shalal harebe meod
vayaku et kal-he'arim sevivovt gerar ki-haya fachad-yehva 'aleyhem vayavozu et-kal-he'arim ki-viza raba hayeta vahem
vegam-aholey miqene hiku vayishebu tson larov ugemalim vayashuvu yerushalaim s
va'azareyahu ben-'ovded hayeta 'alayv rucha elohim
vayetse lifeney asa vayomer lov shema'uni asa vekhal-yehuda uvineyamin yehva 'imakhem biheyovtekhem 'imov veim-tidereshuhu yimatse lakhem veim-ta'azevuhu ya'azov etekhem s
veyamim rabim leyiserael lelo ׀ elohey emet ulelo kohen movre ulelo tovra
vayashav batsar-lov 'al-yehva elohey yiserael vayevaqeshuhu vayimatse lahem

vayashav lehiterape veyizere'el ki hamakim asher hikuhu varama behilachamov et-chazahel melekh aram va'azareyahu ven-yehovram melekh yehuda yarad lireovt et-yehovram ben-acheav beyizere'el ki-chole hu
umeelohim hayeta tevusat achazeyahu lavov el-yovram uvevoov yatsa 'im-yehovram el-yehu ven-nimeshi asher meshachov yehva lehakherit et-beyt acheav
vayehi kehishafet yehu 'im-beyt acheav vayimetsa et-sarey yehuda uveney achey achazeyahu mesharetim laachazeyahu vayaharegem

vayevaqesh et-achazeyahu vayilekeduhu vehu mitechabe veshomerovn vayeviuhu el-yehu vayemituhu vayiqeberuhu ki ameru ben-yehovshafat hu asher-darash et-yehva bekhal-levavov veeyn leveyt achazeyahu la'etsor kocha lemamelakha
va'ataleyahu em achazeyahu raata ki met benah vataqam vatedaber et-kal-zera' hamamelakha leveyt yehuda

vatiqach yehovshave'at bat-hamelekh et-yovash ben-achazeyahu vatigenov otov mitovkh beney-hamelekh hamumatim vatiten otov veet-meyniqetov bachadar hamitovt vatasetirehu yehovshave'at bat-hamelekh yehovram eshet yehovyada' hakohen ki hi hayeta achovt achazeyahu mipeney 'ataleyahu velo hemitatehu
vayehi itam beveyt haelohim mitechabe shesh shanim va'ataleya molekhet 'al-haarets f

uvashana hashevi'it hitechazaq yehovyada' vayiqach et-sarey hameovt la'azareyahu ven-yerocham uleyishema'el ben-yehovchanan vela'azareyahu ven-'ovved veet-ma'aseyahu ven-'adayahu veet-elishafat ben-zikheri 'imov vaberit
vayasobu bihuda vayiqebetsu et-haleviyim mikal-'arey yehuda verashey haavovt leyiserael vayavou el-yerushalaim
vayikherot kal-haqahal berit beveyt haelohim 'im-hamelekh vayomer lahem hine ven-hamelekh yimelokh kaasher diber yehva 'al-beney david
ze hadavar asher ta'asu hashelishit mikem baey hashabat lakohanim velaleviyim lesho'arey hasipim
vehashelishit beveyt hamelekh vehashelishit besha'ar hayesovd vekhal-ha'am bechatserovt beyt yehva
veal-yavov veyt-yehva ki im-hakohanim vehamesharetim laleviyim hema yavou ki-qodesh hema vekhal-ha'am yishemeru mishemeret yehva
vehiqifu haleviyim et-hamelekh saviv ish vekhelayv beyadov vehaba el-habayit yumat viheyu et-hamelekh bevoov uvetsetov
vaya'asu haleviyim vekhal-yehuda kekhol asher-tsiva yehovyada' hakohen vayiqechu ish et-anashayv baey hashabat 'im yovtseey hashabat ki lo fatar yehovyada' hakohen et-hamacheleqovt
vayiten yehovyada' hakohen lesarey hameovt et-hachanitim veet-hamaginovt veet-hashelatim asher lamelekh david asher beyt haelohim
vaya'amed et-kal-ha'am veish ׀ shilechov veyadov miketef habayit hayemanit 'ad-ketef habayit hasemalit lamizebecha velabayit 'al-hamelekh saviv
vayovtsiu et-ben-hamelekh vayitenu 'alayv et-hanezer veet-ha'edut vayamelikhu otov vayimeshachuhu yehovyada' uvanayv vayomeru yechi hamelekh s
vatishema' 'ataleyahu et-qovl ha'am haratsim vehamehalelim et-hamelekh vatavov el-ha'am beyt yehva

vatere vehine hamelekh 'ovmed 'al-'amudov bamavov vehasarim vehachatsotserovt 'al-hamelekh vekhal-'am haarets samecha vetovqe'a bachatsotserovt vehameshovrarim bikheley hashir umovdi'im lehalel vatiqera' 'ataleyahu et-begadeyha vatomer qesher qasher s
vayovtse yehovyada' hakohen et-sarey hameovt ׀ pequdey hachayil vayomer alehem hovtsiuha el-mibeyt hasederovt vehaba achareyha yumat becharev ki amar hakohen lo temituha beyt yehva
vayasimu lah yadayim vatavov el-mevov sha'ar-hasusim beyt hamelekh vayemituha sham f
vayikherot yehovyada' berit beynov uveyn kal-ha'am uveyn hamelekh liheyovt le'am layhva
vayavou khal-ha'am beyt-haba'al vayitetsuhu veet-mizebechotayv veet-tselamayv shiberu veet matan kohen haba'al haregu lifeney hamizebechovt
vayasem yehovyada' pequdot beyt yehva beyad hakohanim haleviyim asher chalaq david 'al-beyt yehva leha'alovt 'olovt yehva kakatuv betovrat moshe besimecha uveshir 'al yedey david
vaya'amed hashov'arim 'al-sha'arey beyt yehva velo-yavo tame lekhal-davar

vayiqach et-sarey hameovt veet-haadirim veet-hamovshelim ba'am veet ׀ kal-'am haarets vayovred et-hamelekh mibeyt yehva vayavou betovkhe-sha'ar ha'eleyovn beyt hamelekh vayovshivu et-hamelekh 'al kise hamamelakha
vayisemechu khal-'am-haarets veha'ir shaqata veet-'ataleyahu hemitu vecharev s
ben-sheva' shanim yoash bemalekhov veareba'im shana malakh birushalaim veshem imov tsiveya mibeer shava'
vaya'as yovash hayashar be'eyney yehva kal-yemey yehovyada' hakohen
vayisa-lov yehovyada' nashim shetayim vayovled banim uvanovt
vayehi achareykhen haya 'im-lev yovash lechadesh et-beyt yehva
vayiqebots et-hakohanim vehaleviyim vayomer lahem tseu le'arey yehuda veqivetsu mikal-yiserael kesef lechazeq ׀ et-beyt eloheykhem midey shana beshana veatem temaharu ladavar velo miharu haleviyim
vayiqera hamelekh lihovyada' harosh vayomer lov madu'a lo-darasheta 'al-haleviyim lehavi mihuda umirushalaim et-maseat moshe 'eved-yehva vehaqahal leyiserael leohel ha'edut
ki 'ataleyahu hamiresha'at baneyha faretsu et-beyt haelohim vegam kal-qadeshey veyt-yehva 'asu labe'alim
vayomer hamelekh vaya'asu arovn echad vayitenuhu besha'ar beyt-yehva chutsa
vayitenu-qovl bihuda uvirushalaim lehavi layhva maseat moshe 'eved-haelohim 'al-yiserael bamidebar
vayisemechu khal-hasarim vekhal-ha'am vayaviu vayashelikhu laarovn 'ad-lekhale

vayehi be'et yavi et-haarovn el-pequdat hamelekh beyad haleviyim vekhireovtam ki-rav hakesef uva sovfer hamelekh ufeqid kohen harosh vi'aru et-haarovn veyisauhu vishivuhu el-meqomov ko 'asu leyovm ׀ beyovm vayaasefu-khesef larov
vayitenehu hamelekh vihovyada' el-'ovse melekhet 'avovdat beyt-yehva vayiheyu sokherim chotsevim vecharashim lechadesh beyt yehva vegam lecharashey varezel unechoshet lechazeq et-beyt yehva
vaya'asu 'osey hamelakha vata'al arukha lamelakha beyadam vaya'amidu et-beyt haelohim 'al-matekunetov vayeametsuhu

ukhekhalovtam heviu lifeney hamelekh vihovyada' et-shear hakesef vaya'asehu khelim leveyt-yehva keley sharet veha'alovt vekhapovt ukheley zahav vakhasef vayiheyu ma'alim 'olovt beveyt-yehva tamid kol yemey yehovyada' f
vayizeqan yehovyada' vayiseba' yamim vayamot ben-mea usheloshim shana bemovtov
vayiqeberuhu ve'ir-david 'im-hamelakhim ki-'asa tovva beyiserael ve'im haelohim uveytov s
veacharey movt yehovyada' bau sarey yehuda vayishetachavu lamelekh az shama' hamelekh aleyhem
vaya'azevu et-beyt yehva elohey avovteyhem vaya'avedu et-haasherim veet-ha'atsabim vayehi-qetsef 'al-yehuda virushalaim beashematam zot
vayishelach bahem neviim lahashivam el-yehva vaya'idu vam velo heezinu s

verucha elohim lavesha et-zekhareya ben-yehovyada' hakohen vaya'amod me'al la'am vayomer lahem ko ׀ amar haelohim lama atem 'overim et-mitseot yehva velo tatselichu ki-'azavetem et-yehva vaya'azov etekhem
vayiqesheru 'alayv vayiregemuhu even bemitsevat hamelekh bachatsar beyt yehva
velo-zakhar yovash hamelekh hachesed asher 'asa yehovyada' aviv 'imov vayaharog et-benov ukhemovtov amar yere yehva veyiderosh f
vayehi ׀ litequfat hashana 'ala 'alayv cheyl aram vayavou el-yehuda virushalaim vayashechitu et-kal-sarey ha'am me'am vekhal-shelalam shilechu lemelekh daremaseq
ki vemitse'ar anashim bau ׀ cheyl aram vayhva natan beyadam chayil larov meod ki 'azevu et-yehva elohey avovteyhem veet-yovash 'asu shefatim

uvelekhetam mimenu ki-'azevu otov bemachaliyim kh bemachaluyim q rabim hiteqasheru 'alayv 'avadayv bidemey beney yehovyada' hakohen vayahareguhu 'al-mitatov vayamot vayiqeberuhu be'ir david velo qevaruhu beqiverovt hamelakhim s
veele hamiteqasherim 'alayv zavad ben-shime'at ha'amovnit vihovzavad ben-shimerit hamovavit
uvanayv verov kh yirev q hamasa 'alayv visovd beyt haelohim hinam ketuvim 'al-miderash sefer hamelakhim vayimelokh amatseyahu venov tachetayv f
ben-'eserim vechamesh shana malakh amatseyahu ve'eserim vatesha' shana malakh birushalaim veshem imov yehov'adan mirushalayim
vaya'as hayashar be'eyney yehva raq lo belevav shalem
vayehi kaasher chazeqa hamamelakha 'alayv vayaharog et-'avadayv hamakim et-hamelekh aviv
veet-beneyhem lo hemit ki khakatuv batovra besefer moshe asher-tsiva yehva lemor lo-yamutu avovt 'al-banim uvanim lo-yamutu 'al-avovt ki ish becheteov yamutu f

vayiqebots amatseyahu et-yehuda vaya'amidem leveyt-avovt lesarey haalafim ulesarey hameovt lekhal-yehuda uvineyamin vayifeqedem lemiben 'eserim shana vama'ela vayimetsaem shelosh-meovt elef bachur yovtse tsava ochez romach vetsina
vayisekor miyiserael mea elef gibovr chayil bemea khikar-kasef
veish haelohim ba elayv lemor hamelekh al-yavo 'imekha tseva yiserael ki eyn yehva 'im-yiserael kol beney eferayim
ki im-bo ata 'ase chazaq lamilechama yakheshilekha haelohim lifeney ovyev ki yesh-kocha belohim la'ezovr ulehakheshil
vayomer amatseyahu leish haelohim umah-la'asovt limeat hakikar asher natati ligedud yiserael vayomer ish haelohim yesh layhva latet lekha harebe mize
vayavedilem amatseyahu lehagedud asher-ba elayv meeferayim lalekhet limeqovmam vayichar apam meod bihuda vayashuvu limeqovmam bachori-af f
vaamatseyahu hitechazaq vayinehag et-'amov vayelekh gey hamelach vayakh et-beney-se'ir 'aseret alafim
va'aseret alafim chayim shavu beney yehuda vayevium lerosh hasala' vayashelikhum merosh-hasela' vekhulam niveqa'u s
uveney hagedud asher heshiv amatseyahu milekhet 'imov lamilechama vayifeshetu be'arey yehuda mishomerovn ve'ad-beyt chovrovn vayaku mehem sheloshet alafim vayavozu biza raba s
vayehi acharey vov amatseyahu mehakovt et-adovmim vayave et-elohey beney se'ir vaya'amidem lov lelohim velifeneyhem yishetachave velahem yeqater
vayichar-af yehva baamatseyahu vayishelach elayv navi vayomer lov lama darasheta et-elohey ha'am asher lo-hitsilu et-'amam miyadekha

vayehi ׀ bedaberov elayv vayomer lov haleyov'ets lamelekh netanukha chadal-lekha lama yakukha vayechedal hanavi vayomer yada'eti ki-ya'ats elohim lehashechitekha ki-'asita zot velo shama'eta la'atsati f
vayiva'ats amatseyahu melekh yehuda vayishelach el-yovash ben-yehovachaz ben-yehu melekh yiserael lemor lekha kh lekha q niterae fanim

vayishelach yovash melekhe-yiserael el-amatseyahu melekhe-yehuda lemor hachovcha asher balevanovn lach el-haerez asher balevanovn lemor tenah-et-bitekha liveni leisha vata'avor chayat hasade asher balevanovn vatiremos et-hachovcha
amareta hine hikita et-edovm unesaakha libekha lehakhebid 'ata sheva beveytekha lama titegare bera'a venafaleta ata vihuda 'imakh
velo-shama' amatseyahu ki mehaelohim hi lema'an titam beyad ki dareshu et elohey edovm
vaya'al yovash melekhe-yiserael vayiterau fanim hu vaamatseyahu melekhe-yehuda beveyt shemesh asher lihuda
vayinagef yehuda lifeney yiserael vayanusu ish leohalayv

veet amatseyahu melekhe-yehuda ben-yovash ben-yehovachaz tafas yovash melekhe-yiserael beveyt shamesh vayeviehu yerushalaim vayiferots bechovmat yerushalaim misha'ar eferayim 'ad-sha'ar hapovne areba' meovt ama
vekhal-hazahav vehakesef veet kal-hakelim hanimetseim beveyt-haelohim 'im-'oved edovm veet-otserovt beyt hamelekh veet beney hata'aruvovt vayashav shomerovn f
vayechi amatseyahu ven-yovash melekh yehuda acharey movt yovash ben-yehovachaz melekh yiserael chamesh 'esere shana
veyeter diverey amatseyahu harishonim vehaacharovnim halo hinam ketuvim 'al-sefer malekhey-yehuda veyiserael
ume'et asher-sar amatseyahu meacharey yehva vayiqesheru 'alayv qesher birushalaim vayanas lakhisha vayishelechu acharayv lakhisha vayemituhu sham
vayisauhu 'al-hasusim vayiqeberu otov 'im-avotayv be'ir yehuda
vayiqechu kal-'am yehuda et-'uziyahu vehu ben-shesh 'esere shana vayamelikhu otov tachat aviv amatseyahu
hu bana et-eylovt vayeshiveha lihuda acharey shekhav-hamelekh 'im-avotayv f
ben-shesh 'esere shana 'uziyahu vemalekhov vachamishim ushetayim shana malakh birushalaim veshem imov yekhileya kh yekhaleya q min-yerushalaim
vaya'as hayashar be'eyney yehva kekhol asher-'asa amatseyahu aviv
vayehi liderosh elohim bimey zekhareyahu hamevin bireot haelohim uvimey dareshov et-yehva hitselichov haelohim s
vayetse vayilachem bapelishetim vayiferots et-chovmat gat veet chovmat yavene veet chovmat ashedovd vayivene 'arim beashedovd uvapelishetim
vaya'ezerehu haelohim 'al-pelishetim ve'al ha'areviyim kh ha'arevim q hayoshevim begur-ba'al vehame'unim
vayitenu ha'amovnim minecha le'uziyahu vayelekh shemov 'ad-levov mitserayim ki hecheziq 'ad-lema'ela
vayiven 'uziyahu migedalim birushalaim 'al-sha'ar hapina ve'al-sha'ar hagaye ve'al-hamiqetsov'a vayechazeqem
vayiven migedalim bamidebar vayachetsov borovt rabim ki miqeneh-rav haya lov uvashefela uvamishovr ikarim vekhoremim beharim uvakaremel ki-ohev adama haya s
vayehi le'uziyahu chayil 'ose milechama yovtseey tsava ligedud bemisepar pequdatam beyad ye'uel kh ye'iel q hasovfer uma'aseyahu hashovter 'al yad-chananeyahu misarey hamelekh
kol misepar rashey haavovt legibovrey chayil alepayim veshesh meovt
ve'al-yadam cheyl tsava shelosh meovt elef veshive'at alafim vachamesh meovt 'ovsey milechama bekhocha chayil la'ezor lamelekh 'al-haovyev
vayakhen lahem 'uziyahu lekhal-hatsava maginim uremachim vekhovva'im veshireyonovt uqeshatovt uleaveney qela'im
vaya'as ׀ birushalaim chishevonovt machashevet chovshev liheyovt 'al-hamigedalim ve'al-hapinovt lirov bachitsim uvaavanim gedolovt vayetse shemov 'ad-lemerachovq ki-hifeli lehe'azer 'ad ki-chazaq
ukhechezeqatov gavah libov 'ad-lehashechit vayime'al bayhva elohayv vayavo el-heykhal yehva lehaqetir 'al-mizebach haqetoret
vayavo acharayv 'azareyahu hakohen ve'imov kohanim ׀ layhva shemovnim beney-chayil
vaya'amedu 'al-'uziyahu hamelekh vayomeru lov lo-lekha 'uziyahu lehaqetir layhva ki lakohanim beney-aharon hamequdashim lehaqetir tse min-hamiqedash ki ma'aleta velo-lekha lekhavovd meyehva elohim
vayize'af 'uziyahu uveyadov miqeteret lehaqetir uveza'epov 'im-hakohanim vehatsara'at zarecha vemitsechov lifeney hakohanim beveyt yehva me'al lemizebach haqetoret
vayifen elayv 'azareyahu khohen harosh vekhal-hakohanim vehineh-hu metsora' bemitsechov vayavehiluhu misham vegam-hu nidechaf latset ki nige'ov yehva
vayehi 'uziyahu hamelekh metsora' ׀ 'ad-yovm movtov vayeshev beyt hachafeshut kh hachafeshit q metsora' ki nigezar mibeyt yehva veyovtam benov 'al-beyt hamelekh shovfet et-'am haarets
veyeter diverey 'uziyahu harishonim vehaacharonim katav yesha'eyahu ven-amovts hanavi
vayishekav 'uziyahu 'im-avotayv vayiqeberu otov 'im-avotayv bisede haqevura asher lamelakhim ki ameru metsovra' hu vayimelokh yovtam benov tachetayv f
ben-'eserim vechamesh shana yovtam bemalekhov veshesh-'esere shana malakh birushalaim veshem imov yerusha bat-tsadovq
vaya'as hayashar be'eyney yehva kekhol asher-'asa 'uziyahu aviv raq lo-va el-heykhal yehva ve'ovd ha'am mashechitim
hu bana et-sha'ar beyt-yehva ha'eleyovn uvechovmat ha'ofel bana larov
ve'arim bana behar-yehuda uvechorashim bana biraniyovt umigedalim

vayitechazeq yovtam ki hekhin derakhayv lifeney yehva elohayv
veyeter diverey yovtam vekhal-milechamotayv uderakhayv hinam ketuvim 'al-sefer malekhey-yiserael vihuda
ben-'eserim vechamesh shana haya vemalekhov veshesh-'esere shana malakh birushalaim
vayishekav yovtam 'im-avotayv vayiqeberu otov be'ir david vayimelokh achaz benov tachetayv f
ben-'eserim shana achaz bemalekhov veshesh-'esere shana malakh birushalaim velo-'asa hayashar be'eyney yehva kedavid aviv
vayelekh bedarekhey malekhey yiserael vegam masekhovt 'asa labe'alim
vehu hiqetir begey ven-hinom vayave'er et-banayv baesh keto'avovt hagovyim asher horish yehva mipeney beney yiserael
vayezabecha vayeqater babamovt ve'al-hageva'ovt vetachat kal-'ets ra'anan
vayitenehu yehva elohayv beyad melekh aram vayaku-vov vayishebu mimenu shiveya gedovla vayaviu daremaseq vegam beyad-melekh yiserael nitan vayakhe-bov maka gedovla s
vayaharog peqach ben-remaleyahu bihuda mea ve'eserim elef beyovm echad hakol beney-chayil be'azevam et-yehva elohey avovtam
vayaharog zikheri ׀ gibovr eferayim et-ma'aseyahu ben-hamelekh veet-'azeriqam negid habayit veet-eleqana mishene hamelekh s
vayishebu veney-yiserael meacheyhem matayim elef nashim banim uvanovt vegam-shalal rav bazezu mehem vayaviu et-hashalal leshomerovn s

vesham haya navi layhva 'oded shemov vayetse lifeney hatsava haba leshomerovn vayomer lahem hine bachamat yehva elohey-avovteykhem 'al-yehuda netanam beyedekhem vataharegu-vam veza'af 'ad lashamayim higi'a
ve'ata beney-yehuda virushalaim atem omerim likhebosh la'avadim velishefachovt lakhem halo raq-atem 'imakhem ashamovt layhva eloheykhem
ve'ata shema'uni vehashivu hashiveya asher shevitem meacheykhem ki charovn af-yehva 'aleykhem s
vayaqumu anashim merashey veney-eferayim 'azareyahu ven-yehovchanan berekheyahu ven-meshilemovt vichizeqiyahu ben-shalum va'amasa ben-chadelay 'al-habaim min-hatsava
vayomeru lahem lo-taviu et-hashiveya hena ki leashemat yehva 'aleynu atem omerim lehosif 'al-chatoteynu ve'al-ashemateynu ki-raba ashema lanu vacharovn af 'al-yiserael s
vaya'azov hechaluts et-hashiveya veet-habiza lifeney hasarim vekhal-haqahal

vayaqumu haanashim asher-niqevu veshemovt vayachaziqu vashiveya vekhal-ma'arumeyhem hilebishu min-hashalal vayalebishum vayane'ilum vayaakhilum vayashequm vayesukhum vayenahalum bachamorim lekhal-kovshel vayevium yerechov 'ir-hatemarim etsel acheyhem vayashuvu shomerovn f
ba'et hahi shalach hamelekh achaz 'al-malekhey ashur la'ezor lov
ve'ovd adovmim bau vayaku vihuda vayishebu-shevi

ufelishetim pashetu be'arey hashefela vehanegev lihuda vayilekedu et-beyt-shemesh veet-ayalovn veet-hagederovt veet-sovkhov uvenovteyha veet-timena uvenovteyha veet-gimezov veet-benoteyha vayeshevu sham
ki-hikheni'a yehva et-yehuda ba'avur achaz melekhe-yiserael ki hiferi'a bihuda uma'ovl ma'al bayhva

utefilatov vehe'ater-lov vekhal-chatatov uma'elov vehameqomovt asher bana vahem bamovt vehe'emid haasherim vehapesilim lifeney hikane'ov hinam ketuvim 'al diverey chovzay
vayishekav menashe 'im-avotayv vayiqeberuhu beytov vayimelokh amovn benov tachetayv f
ben-'eserim ushetayim shana amovn bemalekhov ushetayim shanim malakh birushalaim
vaya'as hara' be'eyney yehva kaasher 'asa menashe aviv ulekhal-hapesilim asher 'asa menashe aviv zibach amovn vaya'avedem
velo nikhena' milifeney yehva kehikana' menashe aviv ki hu amovn hireba ashema
vayiqesheru 'alayv 'avadayv vayemituhu beveytov
vayaku 'am-haarets et kal-haqosherim 'al-hamelekh amovn vayamelikhu 'am-haarets et-yoshiyahu venov tachetayv f
ben-shemovne shanim yoshiyahu vemalekhov usheloshim veachat shana malakh birushalaim
vaya'as hayashar be'eyney yehva vayelekh bedarekhey david aviv velo-sar yamin usemovl
uvishemovne shanim lemalekhov vehu 'ovdenu na'ar hechel liderovsh lelohey david aviv uvisheteym 'esere shana hechel letaher et-yehuda virushalaim min-habamovt vehaasherim vehapesilim vehamasekhovt
vayenatetsu lefanayv et mizebechovt habe'alim vehachamanim asher-lema'ela me'aleyhem gide'a vehaasherim vehapesilim vehamasekhovt shibar vehedaq vayizeroq 'al-peney haqevarim hazovechim lahem
ve'atsemovt kohanim saraf 'al mizebechovtaym kh mizebechovtam q vayetaher et-yehuda veet-yerushalaim
uve'arey menashe veeferayim veshime'ovn ve'ad-nafetali bahar kh bateyhem kh becharevoteyhem q saviv
vayenatets et-hamizebechovt veet-haasherim vehapesilim kitat lehedaq vekhal-hachamanim gida' bekhal-erets yiserael vayashav lirushalaim s
uvishenat shemovne 'esere lemalekhov letaher haarets vehabayit lach et-shafan ben-atsaleyahu veet-ma'aseyahu sar-ha'ir veet yovach ben-yovachaz hamazekir lechazeq et-beyt yehva elohayv

vayavou el-chileqiyahu ׀ hakohen hagadovl vayitenu et-hakesef hamuva veyt-elohim asher asefu-haleviyim shomerey hasaf miyad menashe veeferayim umikol sheerit yiserael umikal-yehuda uvineyamin veyoshevey kh vayashuvu q yerushalaim
vayitenu 'al-yad 'ose hamelakha hamufeqadim beveyt yehva vayitenu otov 'ovsey hamelakha asher 'osim beveyt yehva livedovq ulechazeq habayit
vayitenu lecharashim velabonim liqenovt aveney machetsev ve'etsim lamechaberovt uleqarovt et-habatim asher hishechitu malekhey yehuda
vehaanashim 'osim beemuna bamelakha va'aleyhem ׀ mufeqadim yachat ve'ovadeyahu haleviyim min-beney merari uzekhareya umeshulam min-beney haqehatim lenatsecha vehaleviyim kal-mevin bikheley-shir
ve'al hasabalim umenatsechim lekhol 'ose melakha la'avovda va'avovda umehaleviyim sovferim veshoterim veshov'arim
uvehovtsiam et-hakesef hamuva beyt yehva matsa chileqiyahu hakohen et-sefer tovrat-yehva beyad-moshe
vaya'an chileqiyahu vayomer el-shafan hasovfer sefer hatovra matsati beveyt yehva vayiten chileqiyahu et-hasefer el-shafan
vayave shafan et-hasefer el-hamelekh vayashev 'ovd et-hamelekh davar lemor kol asher-nitan beyad-'avadeykha hem 'osim
vayatikhu et-hakesef hanimetsa beveyt-yehva vayitenuhu 'al-yad hamufeqadim ve'al-yad 'ovsey hamelakha
vayaged shafan hasovfer lamelekh lemor sefer natan li chileqiyahu hakohen vayiqera-vov shafan lifeney hamelekh
vayehi kishemo'a hamelekh et diverey hatovra vayiqera' et-begadayv
vayetsav hamelekh et-chileqiyahu veet-achiqam bensha-fan veet-'avedovn ben-mikha veet ׀ shafan hasovfer veet 'asaya 'eved-hamelekh lemor

lekhu direshu et-yehva ba'adi uve'ad hanishear beyiserael uvihuda 'al-diverey hasefer asher nimetsa ki-gedovla chamat-yehva asher nitekha vanu 'al asher lo-shameru avovteynu et-devar yehva la'asovt kekhal-hakatuv 'al-hasefer haze f
vayelekh chileqiyahu vaasher hamelekh el-chuleda hanevia eshet ׀ shalum ben tovqehat kh taqehat q ben-chasera shovmer habegadim vehi yovshevet birushalaim bamishene vayedaberu eleyha kazot s
vatomer lahem koh-amar yehva elohey yiserael imeru laish asher-shalach etekhem elay s
ko amar yehva hineni mevi ra'a 'al-hamaqovm haze ve'al-yovshevayv et kal-haalovt haketuvovt 'al-hasefer asher qareu lifeney melekh yehuda
tachat ׀ asher 'azavuni vayaqetiru kh vayeqateru q lelohim acherim lema'an hakhe'iseni bekhol ma'asey yedeyhem vetitakh chamati bamaqovm haze velo tikhebe
veel-melekh yehuda hasholecha etekhem liderovsh bayhva ko tomeru elayv s koh-amar yehva elohey yiserael hadevarim asher shama'eta
ya'an rakhe-levavekha vatikana' ׀ milifeney elohim beshame'akha et-devarayv 'al-hamaqovm haze ve'al-yoshevayv vatikana' lefanay vatiqera' et-begadeykha vatevek lefanay vegam-ani shama'eti neum-yehva
hineni osifekha el-avoteykha veneesafeta el-qiveroteykha beshalovm velo-tireeyna 'eyneykha bekhol hara'a asher ani mevi 'al-hamaqovm haze ve'al-yoshevayv vayashivu et-hamelekh davar f
vayishelach hamelekh vayeesof et-kal-ziqeney yehuda virushalaim
vaya'al hamelekh beyt-yehva vekhal-ish yehuda veyoshevey yerushalaim vehakohanim vehaleviyim vekhal-ha'am migadovl ve'ad-qatan vayiqera veazeneyhem et-kal-diverey sefer haberit hanimetsa beyt yehva

vaya'amod hamelekh 'al-'amedov vayikherot et-haberit lifeney yehva lalekhet acharey yehva velishemovr et-mitseotayv ve'edeotayv vechuqayv bekhal-levavov uvekhal-nafeshov la'asovt et-diverey haberit haketuvim 'al-hasefer haze
vaya'amed et kal-hanimetsa virushalaim uvineyamin vaya'asu yoshevey yerushalaim kiverit elohim elohey avovteyhem
vayasar yoshiyahu et-kal-hatov'evovt mikal-haaratsovt asher liveney yiserael vaya'aved et kal-hanimetsa beyiserael la'avovd et-yehva eloheyhem kal-yamayv lo saru meacharey yehva elohey avovteyhem f
vaya'as yoshiyahu virushalaim pesach layhva vayishechatu hapesach beareba'a 'asar lachodesh harishovn
vaya'amed hakohanim 'al-mishemerovtam vayechazeqem la'avovdat beyt yehva

vayomer laleviyim hamevunim kh hamevinim q lekhal-yiserael haqedovshim layhva tenu et-arovn-haqodesh babayit asher bana shelomo ven-david melekh yiserael eyn-lakhem masa bakatef 'ata 'ivedu et-yehva eloheykhem veet 'amov yiserael
vehikovnu kh vehakhinu q leveyt-avovteykhem kemacheleqovteykhem bikhetav david melekh yiserael uvemikhetav shelomo venov
ve'imedu vaqodesh lifelugovt beyt haavovt laacheykhem beney ha'am vachaluqat beyt-av laleviyim
veshachatu hapasach vehiteqadeshu vehakhinu laacheykhem la'asovt kidevar-yehva beyad-moshe f
vayarem yoshiyahu liveney ha'am tson kevasim uveney-'izim hakol lapesachim lekhal-hanimetsa lemisepar sheloshim elef uvaqar sheloshet alafim ele merekhush hamelekh s
vesarayv linedava la'am lakohanim velaleviyim herimu chileqiya uzekhareyahu vichiel negidey beyt haelohim lakohanim natenu lapesachim alepayim veshesh meovt uvaqar shelosh meovt
vekhavnaneyahu kh vekhananeyahu q ushema'eyahu unetaneel echayv vachashaveyahu vi'iel veyovzavad sarey haleviyim herimu laleviyim lapesachim chameshet alafim uvaqar chamesh meovt
vatikovn ha'avovda vaya'amedu hakohanim 'al-'amedam vehaleviyim 'al-macheleqovtam kemitsevat hamelekh
vayishechatu hapasach vayizerequ hakohanim miyadam vehaleviyim mafeshitim
vayasiru ha'ola letitam lemifelagovt leveyt-avovt liveney ha'am lehaqeriv layhva kakatuv besefer moshe vekhen labaqar
vayevashelu hapesach baesh kamishepat vehaqodashim bishelu basirovt uvadevadim uvatselachovt vayaritsu lekhal-beney ha'am
veachar hekhinu lahem velakohanim ki hakohanim beney aharon beha'alovt ha'ovla vehachalavim 'ad-layela vehaleviyim hekhinu lahem velakohanim beney aharon
vehameshorarim beney-asaf 'al-ma'amadam kemitsevat david veasaf veheyman vidutun chovze hamelekh vehasho'arim lesha'ar vasha'ar eyn lahem lasur me'al 'avodatam ki-acheyhem haleviyim hekhinu lahem
vatikovn kal-'avovdat yehva bayovm hahu la'asovt hapesach veha'alovt 'olovt 'al mizebach yehva kemitsevat hamelekh yoshiyahu
vaya'asu veney-yiserael hanimetseim et-hapesach ba'et hahi veet-chag hamatsovt shive'at yamim

velo-na'asa fesach kamohu beyiserael mimey shemuel hanavi vekhal-malekhey yiserael ׀ lo-'asu kapesach asher-'asa yoshiyahu vehakohanim vehaleviyim vekhal-yehuda veyiserael hanimetsa veyovshevey yerushalaim s
bishemovne 'esere shana lemalekhut yoshiyahu na'asa hapesach haze
acharey khal-zot asher hekhin yoshiyahu et-habayit 'ala nekhov melekhe-mitserayim lehilachem bekharekemish 'al-perat vayetse liqeratov yoshiyahu
vayishelach elayv maleakhim ׀ lemor ׀ mah-li valakh melekh yehuda lo-'aleykha ata hayovm ki el-beyt milechameti velohim amar levahaleni chadal-lekha meelohim asher-'imi veal-yashechitekha
velo-hesev yoshiyahu fanayv mimenu ki lehilachem-bov hitechapes velo shama' el-diverey nekhov mipi elohim vayavo lehilachem beviqe'at megidov
vayoru hayorim lamelekh yoshiyahu vayomer hamelekh la'avadayv ha'aviruni ki hacholeyti meod
vaya'aviruhu 'avadayv min-hamerekava vayarekivuhu 'al rekhev hamishene asher-lov vayovlikhuhu yerushalaim vayamat vayiqaver beqiverovt avotayv vekhal-yehuda virushalaim miteabelim 'al-yoshiyahu f
vayeqovnen yiremeyahu 'al-yoshiyahu vayomeru khal-hasharim ׀ vehasharovt beqinovteyhem 'al-yoshiyahu 'ad-hayovm vayitenum lechoq 'al-yiserael vehinam ketuvim 'al-haqinovt
veyeter diverey yoshiyahu vachasadayv kakatuv betovrat yehva
udevarayv harishonim vehaacharonim hinam ketuvim 'al-sefer malekhey-yiserael vihuda
vayiqechu 'am-haarets et-yehovachaz ben-yoshiyahu vayamelikhuhu tachat-aviv birushalaim
ben-shalovsh ve'eserim shana yovachaz bemalekhov ushelosha chodashim malakh birushalaim
vayesirehu melekhe-mitserayim birushalaim vaya'anosh et-haarets mea khikar-kesef vekhikar zahav
vayamelekh melekhe-mitserayim et-eleyaqim achiv 'al-yehuda virushalaim vayasev et-shemov yehovyaqim veet-yovachaz achiv laqach nekhov vayeviehu mitserayema f
ben-'eserim vechamesh shana yehovyaqim bemalekhov veachat 'esere shana malakh birushalaim vaya'as hara' be'eyney yehva elohayv
'alayv 'ala nevukhadenetsar melekh bavel vayaaserehu banechushetayim leholikhov bavela
umikeley beyt yehva hevi nevukhadenetsar levavel vayitenem beheykhalov bevavel
veyeter diverey yehovyaqim veto'avotayv asher-'asa vehanimetsa 'alayv hinam ketuvim 'al-sefer malekhey yiserael vihuda vayimelokh yehovyakhin benov tachetayv f
ben-shemovne shanim yehovyakhin bemalekhov ushelosha chodashim va'aseret yamim malakh birushalaim vaya'as hara' be'eyney yehva
veliteshuvat hashana shalach hamelekh nevukhadenetsar vayeviehu vavela 'im-keley chemedat beyt-yehva vayamelekh et-tsideqiyahu achiv 'al-yehuda virushalaim f
ben-'eserim veachat shana tsideqiyahu vemalekhov veachat 'esere shana malakh birushalaim
vaya'as hara' be'eyney yehva elohayv lo nikhena' milifeney yiremeyahu hanavi mipi yehva
vegam bamelekh nevukhadenetsar marad asher hishebi'ov belohim vayeqesh et-'arepov vayeamets et-levavov mishuv el-yehva elohey yiserael
gam kal-sarey hakohanim veha'am hirebu lime'ovl kh lime'al-ma'al q kekhol to'avovt hagovyim vayetameu et-beyt yehva asher hiqedish birushalaim
vayishelach yehva elohey avovteyhem 'aleyhem beyad maleakhayv hashekem veshalovcha ki-chamal 'al-'amov ve'al-me'ovnov
vayiheyu male'ivim bemaleakhey haelohim uvovzim devarayv umita'ete'im bineviayv 'ad 'alovt chamat-yehva be'amov 'ad-leeyn marepe
vaya'al 'aleyhem et-melekh kasediyim kh kasedim q vayaharog bachureyhem bacherev beveyt miqedasham velo chamal 'al-bachur uvetula zaqen veyashesh hakol natan beyadov
vekhol keley beyt haelohim hagedolim vehaqetanim veotserovt beyt yehva veotserovt hamelekh vesarayv hakol hevi vavel
vayiserefu et-beyt haelohim vayenatetsu et chovmat yerushalaim vekhal-aremenovteyha sarefu vaesh vekhal-keley machamadeyha lehashechit s
vayegel hasheerit min-hacherev el-bavel vayiheyu-lov ulevanayv la'avadim 'ad-melokh malekhut paras
lemalovt devar-yehva befi yiremeyahu 'ad-ratseta haarets et-shabetovteyha kal-yemey hashama shavata lemalovt shive'im shana f
uvishenat achat lekhovresh melekh paras likhelovt devar-yehva befi yiremeyahu he'ir yehva et-rucha kovresh melekhe-paras vaya'aver-qovl bekhal-malekhutov vegam-bemikhetav lemor s
koh-amar kovresh ׀ melekh paras kal-mamelekhovt haarets natan li yehva elohey hashamayim vehu-faqad 'alay livenovt-lov vayit birushalaim asher bihuda mi-vakhem mikal-'amov yehva elohayv 'imov veya'al
